title: Intrinsic is joining Google to advance physical AI in robotics
description:
Intrinsic originally spun out from Google parent Alphabet in 2021, and it has since worked with Alphabet subsidiaries.

The post Intrinsic is joining Google to advance physical AI in robotics appeared first on The Robot Report.
